name: @agentmemories/mcp
author: Yorick Chan <yorick@gmail.com>
description: Universal AI-agent memory — MCP client for agent-memories server

scripts.build: bun run build:types && bun run build:js && bun run build:skill
scripts.build:js: bun build src/cli.ts --outdir dist --target node --format esm --minify && cp dist/cli.js dist/agent-memories-mcp && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/agent-memories-mcp > dist/agent-memories-mcp.tmp && mv dist/agent-memories-mcp.tmp dist/agent-memories-mcp && chmod +x dist/agent-memories-mcp
scripts.build:skill: cp SKILL.md dist/ && cp -r references/ dist/references/
scripts.test: echo 'Tests need import path updates for monorepo'
